title: Iowa Code § 1.11 - Keokuk cemetery and Knoxville hospital — assumption of jurisdiction
text:
At the time of the return of jurisdiction over lands occupied by the veterans administration hospital located in Knoxville, Marion county, Iowa, and the Keokuk National Cemetery at Keokuk located in Lee county, Iowa, by the administrator of veterans affairs to the state of Iowa, the state of Iowa assumes criminal and civil jurisdiction on both grounds in the same manner as provided in section 1.4.
[C77, 79, 81, §1.11]
